jqlQueries.mainQuery: project = RES AND fixVersion = '25.9' AND development[pullrequests].all > 0 and development[pullrequests].open = 0
jqlQueries.testCaseCheck: project = RES AND issuetype = 'Test' AND issue in linkedIssues({issueKey})
jqlQueries.testPlanFilter: issue in linkedIssues('{testPlanKey}') AND issueType = Test AND status != Closed
